rules.title: IME Logs directory check
rules.description: Checks whether the Intune Management Extension log directory exists and reports file sizes. Useful to verify IME is active and logs are being written.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: Collect dsregcmd join status
rules.description: Runs dsregcmd /status to capture the Azure AD / Entra join state when the device enters the Account Setup phase.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: Collect last system startup event
rules.description: Collects the most recent Event ID 12 (Kernel-General) from the System log which indicates the last OS startup time.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: BIOS information
rules.description: Queries WMI for BIOS details including manufacturer, version, serial number, and release date. Helps correlate firmware-level issues with enrollment problems.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: Windows Update history snapshot
rules.description: Lists recently installed hotfixes/updates (Get-HotFix) at agent startup as secondary corroboration of updates applied during enrollment. Complements the live WindowsUpdate watcher — catches updates whose events fell outside the watcher's backfill window. Opt-in: Get-HotFix spawns a PowerShell cmdlet and only reports QFE-registered updates (it misses some cumulative/driver updates and all failures), so enable per tenant after weighing the OOBE cost.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: Windows Update pending reboot
rules.description: Checks the Component Based Servicing RebootPending registry key at agent startup and emits windows_update_reboot_pending ONLY when a reboot is actually pending (the key exists). A pending reboot present when the agent starts is a high-confidence corroborator that a Windows Update (often a quality/cumulative update installed during the OOBE 'Getting updates' phase, before the agent started) landed and now needs a restart — which can delay or block enrollment completion.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: MDM enrollment diagnostic events
rules.description: Collects recent events from the DeviceManagement Enterprise Diagnostics Provider at the FinalizingSetup phase. Captures MDM sync errors, policy application failures, and enrollment diagnostics accumulated throughout the session.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: Applied MDM device policies
rules.description: Reads the PolicyManager registry key to list all MDM device policies that have been applied. Verifies that expected compliance and configuration policies landed on the device during enrollment.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: Machine certificates
rules.description: Lists certificates in the local machine personal store (My). Verifies that the MDM enrollment certificate and any SCEP certificates have been provisioned.
rules.author: Autopilot Monitor

rules.title: Machine certificate store (PowerShell)
rules.description: Enumerates certificates in the local machine personal store (Cert:\LocalMachine\My) using PowerShell. Returns structured JSON with subject, thumbprint, issuer, and validity dates for each certificate. Useful for verifying MDM enrollment certificates, SCEP certificates, and any other machine certificates provisioned during Autopilot enrollment.
rules.author: Community
rules.target: $c = Get-ChildItem Cert:\LocalMachine\My; if ($c) { $c | Select-Object Subject, Thumbprint, Issuer, NotBefore, NotAfter, HasPrivateKey | ConvertTo-Json } else { '{"CertificateCount": 0}' }
